market_brief.summary_en: Market in MIXED regime (52.2/100) with SPY and QQQ distribution days at 7 and 6 signaling DANGER amid neutral social sentiment.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $455.10 yesterday up 5.26% and trades at $452.32 in pre-market. All moving averages above price with EMA200 rising and GC above confirm Stage2 6/7 and RS 100.0 structure. Social posts emphasize TSMC AI manufacturing dominance and supply shortages driving optimistic sentiment.
